name: I signed a release with adjuster already for my illness claim. Can I reopen?
description: Hard, unless fraud/new facts; check with lawyer.[1]

mainEntity.name: I signed a release with adjuster already for my illness claim. Can I reopen?

acceptedAnswer.text: Hard, unless fraud/new facts; check with lawyer.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly if fraud/mistake; final settlements hard to undo in Utah.[1] Key factors: (1) New evidence; (2) Aggravation; (3) Consult attorney fast.[1] Avoid signing hastily next time.[4] Review terms now.
